description: A driver's vehicle insurance is expiring. They must upload their new insurance card to keep their account active.

nodes.task_description: The system sends an automated reminder to the driver that their insurance document expires in 15 days.
The driver uploads a picture of their new insurance card via the driver app.

expected_outcome.expected: The new document is received by the system.

nodes.task_description: The system uses OCR to read the policy number and expiration date from the image.

expected_outcome.expected: The document details are automatically extracted.

nodes.task_description: The system validates the new expiration date and updates the driver's profile, clearing the expiration warning.

expected_outcome.expected: The driver's account remains in good standing.
